news.title:
Power stocks like Adani Power, Tata Power, JP Power rise amid market crash, driven by peak summer demand & stable fuel availability.
Adani Power gained 3.7%, JP Power 3.4%, Tata Power 2.7%; Sensex, Nifty fell on geopolitical tensions & crude oil price surge.
news.summary:
Power stocks like Adani Power, Tata Power, JP Power rise amid market crash, driven by peak summer demand & stable fuel availability.
Adani Power gained 3.7%, JP Power 3.4%, Tata Power 2.7%; Sensex, Nifty fell on geopolitical tensions & crude oil price surge.

news.title:
Delhi's EV Policy 2026-2030 aims to phase out petrol vehicles, boosting EV adoption.
Bajaj Auto, TVS, Mahindra, Tata Power, Exide may benefit; focus on EVs, charging infra, batteries.
news.summary:
Delhi's EV Policy 2026-2030 aims to phase out petrol vehicles, boosting EV adoption.

news.title:
Kush Bohra shares stock picks like Tata Power, Laurus Labs, Apollo Hospitals, with buy/sell calls and targets.
He highlights Tata Steel, Jindal Steel for bullish outlook; cautions sector rotation into financials.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Energy, NTPC, and Tata Power face mixed Q4 performance; PL Capital favors NTPC, Power Grid, and CESC.
PL Capital notes stable demand, moderated prices, and renewable energy's role; below-normal monsoon could boost demand.
news.summary:
Adani Energy, NTPC, and Tata Power face mixed Q4 performance; PL Capital favors NTPC, Power Grid, and CESC.
PL Capital notes stable demand, moderated prices, and renewable energy's role; below-normal monsoon could boost demand.

The platform focuses on accelerating the energy transition efforts.

news.title:
Tata Power resumed operations at its 4150 MW Mundra plant after a temporary suspension.
The update highlights the restart of core activities at the Mundra plant.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.

news.title:
Tata Power commissioned 400 kV Tanda Gonda-Basti double circuit lines spanning 154 km.
SEUPPTCL project includes 951 Ckm of 765 kV lines, enhancing UP's grid and energy security.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.
news.summary:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.

news.title:
MOSL rates Tata Power 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 455, citing SPPA for Mundra reducing losses by ~75%.
Earnings upgrade of ~5% supported by Odisha/Delhi discoms, rooftop solar growth, and 10GW backward integration.
news.summary:
MOSL rates Tata Power 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 455, citing SPPA for Mundra reducing losses by ~75%.
Earnings upgrade of ~5% supported by Odisha/Delhi discoms, rooftop solar growth, and 10GW backward integration.
